creator: omatsuda000@gmail.com
text:
(In reply to Tijl Coosemans from comment #1)

Thank you for your suggestion.
But unfortunately it didn't alter the situation.

diff -abc Makefile.orig Makefile
*** Makefile.orig       Sat Jun 16 08:22:06 2018
--- Makefile    Tue Jun 26 11:20:07 2018
***************
*** 40,46 ****
                --enable-fontconfig \
                --enable-freetype \
                --enable-openjpeg \
-               --enable-threadsafe \
                --with-drivers=ALL \
                --with-fontpath=${LOCALBASE}/share/fonts \
                --with-jbig2dec \
--- 40,45 ----

work/ghostscript-9.23/config.log is attached in the other comment.
It still denies to include opvp driver.
